---
title: "dada2 pipeline"
author: "Mercy Neal"
date: "2025-10-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dada2)

library(Biostrings)
library(tidyverse)
```



```{r}
# Read in your FASTA file
csvseqs <- read.csv("rarefied_decon_asv_taxa_15000.csv")
seqs <- readDNAStringSet("rarifiedwithno.fasta")

```




``` {r}

##CHANGE TO RIGHT SILVA FILE
# Assign taxonomy
taxa <- assignTaxonomy(seqs, "silva_nr99_v138.2_toGenus_trainset.fa.gz", multithread = TRUE)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(taxa, 'taxa1.rds')
```



```{r}
#add species, then merge by seq

taxagenus <- readRDS('taxa1.rds')


```


```{r}
sptaxa <- addSpecies(taxagenus, "silva_v138.2_assignSpecies.fa.gz")
```
```{r}

combinedtaxa <- left_join(taxagenus, csvseqs, by = 'names')
```
